multiply the body as many uh as he can as he is able to depending on how great his psychic power is and then he can walk through walls he can dive into the ground like diving into water and come out again he can float in the air he can go up to fly up to the heaven even with his physical body etc so it is the first psychic power the second 1 is the deva ear having the heavenly ear he can hear sounds far away or near and the third 1 he can read other beings minds with his mind with his mind encompassing the mind of some other person he can read other people's thoughts and then after that now he can recall the previous lives 1 birth 2 births 3 100 a thousand births etc uh he can remember his past lives and then the fifth 1 you can possess the heavenly eye where you can see a deva just like devas he can see beings in other worlds and then the last 1 uh he can if you wanna destroy the ah savasana and become an arahant so this is the power of boundless concentration yes that is why
